name: Chili-Beef Macaroni
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the lean ground beef, onion, green bell pepper, and garlic in a skillet until the beef is browned.
2. Add the cooked elbow macaroni, kidney beans, diced tomatoes (with juices), tomato sauce, Dijon mustard, chili powder, lemon juice, ground cumin, salt, and pepper to the skillet.
3. Stir everything together and bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and let it simmer for 10 minutes until heated through.
5. Makes approximately 6 1/2 cups.
6. To freeze: Add remaining ingredients to the beef mixture and freeze. Thaw in the refrigerator and reheat before serving.
